ai_templates.prompt_template: Write one concise Vanguard University activity result line for '{display_name}' at {location_name}. Category: {category}. Provider: {provider_name}. Outcome: {outcome_id}. Keep it under 20 words.
ai_templates.fallback: {display_name} changes the shape of the day.

ai_templates.prompt_template: Write a two-sentence in-world campus blurb about {display_name}. Description: {description}. Location: {location_name}.
ai_templates.fallback: {display_name} is part of Vanguard University's daily machinery. {description}

ai_templates.prompt_template: Write a two-sentence in-world blurb about the transformation part {display_name}. Description: {description}. Tags: {tag_summary}.
